CheckTitle: Okta password policies enforce a maximum password age of 60 days
Description: **Okta Password Policy maximum password age** should require rotation within 60 days in every active policy.
Risk: **Excessive or missing maximum password age** lets compromised passwords remain valid longer, extending the window for account takeover.

Code.Other: Security > Authentication > Password: edit each active password policy and adjust password settings to the STIG requirement.

Recommendation.Text: **Set maximum password age to 60 days or less in every active Okta Password Policy** and align exceptions with documented business risk.
